dj_text: Viva la vida - Coldplay (Medieval version) out. Shooting Stars (Medieval version) [Bardcore] in. No questions.
commercial_text: Brought to you by NoodleCorp — we put noodles in everything. Noodle soup. Noodle salad. Noodle coffee. Noodle mattress.
hijack_text: Bingo Night Radio from the Eternal Community Center!
recovery_text: They're gone. We're back. Don't ask which 'they' — you don't want to know.
title: Shooting Stars (Medieval version) [Bardcore]
